description: Spring RTS Synced Control API - functions that modify game state. Must be called from synced code only (inside gadgetHandler:IsSyncedCode()).

Game End.description: Functions to end the game or eliminate teams.

functions.name: Spring.KillTeam
functions.signature: Spring.KillTeam(number teamID)
functions.description: Declares a team dead; prevents further orders.

functions.name: Spring.GameOver
functions.signature: Spring.GameOver(number allyTeamID1, number allyTeamID2, ...)
functions.description: Declares game over with winning ally teams.

RulesParams.description: Set custom key-value parameters on units, features, teams, or globally. Useful for communicating state between gadgets or to widgets.

functions.name: Spring.SetGameRulesParam
functions.signature: Spring.SetGameRulesParam(string paramName, number|string paramValue [, table losAccess])
functions.description: Sets a global game rule parameter.

functions.name: Spring.SetTeamRulesParam
functions.signature: Spring.SetTeamRulesParam(number teamID, string paramName, number|string paramValue [, table losAccess])
functions.description: Sets a team rule parameter.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitRulesParam
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitRulesParam(number unitID, string paramName, number|string paramValue [, table losAccess])
functions.description: Sets a unit rule parameter with optional access control.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureRulesParam
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureRulesParam(number featureID, string paramName, number|string paramValue [, table losAccess])
functions.description: Sets a feature rule parameter.

Resources.description: Functions to modify team resource levels (metal, energy, storage, sharing).

functions.name: Spring.AddTeamResource
functions.signature: Spring.AddTeamResource(number teamID, string "metal"|"energy", number amount)
functions.description: Adds resources to a team.

functions.name: Spring.UseTeamResource
functions.signature: Spring.UseTeamResource(number teamID, string "metal"|"energy", number amount)
functions.description: Consumes/spends team resources. Returns true if the team had enough.

functions.name: Spring.SetTeamResource
functions.signature: Spring.SetTeamResource(number teamID, string res, number amount)
functions.description: Sets resource amount directly. res can be: "metal", "energy", "ms" (metal storage), "es" (energy storage).

functions.name: Spring.SetTeamShareLevel
functions.signature: Spring.SetTeamShareLevel(number teamID, string "metal"|"energy", number amount)
functions.description: Changes the resource sharing threshold for a team.

functions.name: Spring.ShareTeamResource
functions.signature: Spring.ShareTeamResource(number teamID_src, number teamID_recv, string "metal"|"energy", number amount)
functions.description: Transfers resources from one team to another.

functions.name: Spring.SetAlly
functions.signature: Spring.SetAlly(number firstAllyTeamID, number secondAllyTeamID, bool ally)
functions.description: Changes alliance between two ally teams.

functions.name: Spring.AssignPlayerToTeam
functions.signature: Spring.AssignPlayerToTeam(number playerID, number teamID)
functions.description: Assigns a player to a team.

functions.name: Spring.SetGlobalLos
functions.signature: Spring.SetGlobalLos(number allyTeamID, bool globallos)
functions.description: Grants or revokes global line of sight for an allyTeam.

Unit Creation & Destruction.description: Functions to create, destroy, and transfer units.

functions.name: Spring.CreateUnit
functions.signature: Spring.CreateUnit(string defName|number unitDefID, number x, number y, number z, string facing|number facing, number teamID [, bool build [, bool flattenGround [, number builderID]]])
functions.description: Creates a unit at the specified location. facing: 'n','s','e','w' or 0-3.

functions.name: Spring.DestroyUnit
functions.signature: Spring.DestroyUnit(number unitID [, bool selfd [, bool reclaimed [, number attackerID]]])
functions.description: Destroys a unit. selfd=true simulates self-destruct, reclaimed=true simulates reclaim. attackerID credits the kill.

functions.name: Spring.TransferUnit
functions.signature: Spring.TransferUnit(number unitID, number newTeamID [, bool given])
functions.description: Transfers unit ownership. given=true means voluntary transfer, false means captured.

Unit Health & Damage.description: Functions to modify unit health, apply damage, and control armor.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitHealth
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitHealth(number unitID, number health|table {health, capture, paralyze, build})
functions.description: Sets unit health values. Can pass a single number or a table with named fields.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitMaxHealth
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitMaxHealth(number unitID, number maxHealth)
functions.description: Sets the maximum health of a unit.

functions.name: Spring.AddUnitDamage
functions.signature: Spring.AddUnitDamage(number unitID, number damage [, number paralyzer [, number attackerID [, number weaponDefID [, number projectileID]]]])
functions.description: Applies damage to a unit. Optional paralyzer flag and attacker attribution.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitArmored
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitArmored(number unitID, bool armored [, number armorMultiple])
functions.description: Sets whether a unit is in armored state and the damage multiplier.

Unit Costs & Experience.description: Functions to modify unit costs and experience.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitCosts
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitCosts(number unitID, table {buildTime, metalCost, energyCost})
functions.description: Modifies the resource costs of a unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitExperience
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitExperience(number unitID, number experience)
functions.description: Sets the experience level of a unit.

Unit Resourcing.description: Functions to modify per-unit resource generation and consumption. Key for economy gadgets.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitResourcing
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitResourcing(number unitID, string res, number amount) or Spring.SetUnitResourcing(number unitID, table {res = amount, ...})
functions.description: Sets unit resource generation/consumption. res keys: 'umm' (use metal make), 'ume' (use metal extraction), 'uem' (use energy make), 'cmm' (current metal make), 'cme' (current metal extraction), 'cem' (current energy make), etc.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitMetalExtraction
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitMetalExtraction(number unitID, number depth [, number range])
functions.description: Sets the metal extraction rate and range for a metal extractor unit.

functions.name: Spring.AddUnitResource
functions.signature: Spring.AddUnitResource(number unitID, string "m"|"e", number amount)
functions.description: Adds resource to unit (m=metal, e=energy).

functions.name: Spring.UseUnitResource
functions.signature: Spring.UseUnitResource(number unitID, string "m"|"e", number amount)
functions.description: Consumes unit resources.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitHarvestStorage
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitHarvestStorage(number unitID, number metal)
functions.description: Sets the harvest storage capacity of a unit.

Unit Movement & Position.description: Functions to control unit position, velocity, rotation, and movement.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitPosition
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitPosition(number unitID, number x, number z [, bool alwaysAboveSea])
functions.description: Sets unit horizontal position (y is determined by ground height).

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitVelocity
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitVelocity(number unitID, number velX, number velY, number velZ)
functions.description: Sets unit velocity vector.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitRotation
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitRotation(number unitID, number yaw, number pitch, number roll)
functions.description: Sets unit rotation angles.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitDirection
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitDirection(number unitID, number x, number y, number z)
functions.description: Sets unit facing direction vector.

functions.name: Spring.AddUnitImpulse
functions.signature: Spring.AddUnitImpulse(number unitID, number x, number y, number z [, number decayRate])
functions.description: Applies impulse force to a unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitPhysics
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitPhysics(number unitID, number posX, number posY, number posZ, number velX, number velY, number velZ, number rotX, number rotY, number rotZ, number dragX, number dragY, number dragZ)
functions.description: Sets complete unit physics state in one call.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitMoveGoal
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitMoveGoal(number unitID, number goalX, number goalY, number goalZ [, number goalRadius [, number moveSpeed [, bool moveRaw]]])
functions.description: Sets the movement destination for a unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitLandGoal
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitLandGoal(number unitID, number goalX, number goalY, number goalZ [, number goalRadius])
functions.description: Sets landing destination for air units.

functions.name: Spring.ClearUnitGoal
functions.signature: Spring.ClearUnitGoal(number unitID)
functions.description: Clears the unit's current movement/action goal.

Unit Properties.description: Functions to modify misc unit properties (mass, range, blocking, tooltip, etc).

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitMaxRange
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitMaxRange(number unitID, number maxRange)
functions.description: Sets the maximum weapon/attack range of a unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitMass
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitMass(number unitID, number mass)
functions.description: Sets the mass of a unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitBlocking
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitBlocking(number unitID, bool isblocking, bool isSolidObjectCollidable, bool isProjectileCollidable, bool isRaySegmentCollidable, bool crushable, bool blockEnemyPushing, bool blockHeightChanges)
functions.description: Configures unit collision/blocking properties.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitTooltip
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitTooltip(number unitID, string tooltip)
functions.description: Sets the tooltip text for a unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitBuildSpeed
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitBuildSpeed(number builderID, number buildSpeed [, number repairSpeed [, number reclaimSpeed [, number resurrectSpeed [, number captureSpeed [, number terraformSpeed]]]]])
functions.description: Sets the build/repair/reclaim speeds for a builder unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitNeutral
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitNeutral(number unitID, bool neutral)
functions.description: Sets whether a unit is neutral. (removed in v83.0)

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitCrashing
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitCrashing(number unitID, bool crashing)
functions.description: Sets whether a unit is in crashing state.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitStockpile
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitStockpile(number unitID [, number stockpile [, number buildPercent]])
functions.description: Sets the stockpile count and build progress for a unit.

Unit LOS & Stealth.description: Functions to control unit visibility, cloaking, and sensor radius.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitCloak
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitCloak(number unitID, bool cloaked|number scriptCloak [, bool decloakAbs|number decloakDistance])
functions.description: Controls unit cloaking state.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitStealth
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitStealth(number unitID, bool stealth)
functions.description: Sets unit radar stealth status.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitSonarStealth
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitSonarStealth(number unitID, bool sonarStealth)
functions.description: Sets unit sonar stealth mode.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitAlwaysVisible
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitAlwaysVisible(number unitID, bool alwaysVisible)
functions.description: Makes unit always visible regardless of LOS.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitSensorRadius
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitSensorRadius(number unitID, string type, number radius)
functions.description: Sets sensor detection radius. type: 'los','airLos','radar','sonar','seismic','radarJammer','sonarJammer'.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitLosState
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitLosState(number unitID, number allyTeam, number los|table losTypes)
functions.description: Sets unit LOS state for a specific allyTeam.

Unit Weapons.description: Functions to control unit weapon state and targeting.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitTarget
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitTarget(number unitID, number enemyUnitID|nil [, bool dgun [, bool userTarget [, number weaponNum]]]) or Spring.SetUnitTarget(number unitID, number x, number y, number z [, bool dgun [, bool userTarget [, number weaponNum]]])
functions.description: Defines the attack target for a unit. Pass nil to clear.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitWeaponState
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitWeaponState(number unitID, number weaponNum, table states) or Spring.SetUnitWeaponState(number unitID, number weaponNum, string key, number value)
functions.description: Sets weapon state properties (e.g., reload time, range, projectile speed).

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitWeaponDamages
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitWeaponDamages(number unitID, number weaponNum|string, table damages) or Spring.SetUnitWeaponDamages(number unitID, number weaponNum|string, string key, number value)
functions.description: Modifies weapon damage properties.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitShieldState
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitShieldState(number unitID [, number weaponID [, bool enabled [, number power]]])
functions.description: Controls unit shield state (enable/disable, set power).

functions.name: Spring.UnitWeaponFire
functions.signature: Spring.UnitWeaponFire(number unitID, number weaponID)
functions.description: Forces a unit to fire a specific weapon.

functions.name: Spring.UnitWeaponHoldFire
functions.signature: Spring.UnitWeaponHoldFire(number unitID, number weaponID)
functions.description: Forces a unit weapon to hold fire.

functions.name: Spring.UnitAttach
functions.signature: Spring.UnitAttach(number transporterID, number passengerID, number pieceNum)
functions.description: Attaches a passenger unit to a transporter at a specific piece.

functions.name: Spring.UnitDetach
functions.signature: Spring.UnitDetach(number passengerID)
functions.description: Detaches a unit from its transport.

functions.name: Spring.UnitDetachFromAir
functions.signature: Spring.UnitDetachFromAir(number passengerID)
functions.description: Detaches a unit from air transport (drops it).

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitLoadingTransport
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitLoadingTransport(number passengerID, number transportID)
functions.description: Disables collisions between units during transport loading approach.

Unit Collision Volumes.description: Functions to modify unit and piece collision volumes.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitCollisionVolumeData
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitCollisionVolumeData(number unitID, number scaleX, number scaleY, number scaleZ, number offsetX, number offsetY, number offsetZ, number vType, number tType, number Axis)
functions.description: Configures unit collision volume shape and offset.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitPieceCollisionVolumeData
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitPieceCollisionVolumeData(number unitID, number pieceIndex, bool enable, number scaleX, number scaleY, number scaleZ, number offsetX, number offsetY, number offsetZ [, number volumeType [, number primaryAxis]])
functions.description: Configures collision volume for a specific unit piece.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitMidAndAimPos
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitMidAndAimPos(number unitID, number mpX, number mpY, number mpZ, number apX, number apY, number apZ [, bool relative])
functions.description: Sets unit center and aim positions.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitRadiusAndHeight
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitRadiusAndHeight(number unitID, number radius, number height)
functions.description: Sets unit collision radius and height.

Unit Movement Types.description: Functions to control movement type parameters for different unit locomotion types.

functions.name: Spring.SetGroundMoveTypeData
functions.signature: Spring.SetGroundMoveTypeData(number unitID, table properties)
functions.description: Controls ground unit movement properties (maxSpeed, turnRate, accRate, etc).

functions.name: Spring.SetAirMoveTypeData
functions.signature: Spring.SetAirMoveTypeData(number unitID, table properties)
functions.description: Controls air unit (airplane) movement properties.

functions.name: Spring.SetGunshipMoveTypeData
functions.signature: Spring.SetGunshipMoveTypeData(number unitID, table properties)
functions.description: Controls gunship/helicopter movement properties.

Feature Creation & Destruction.description: Functions to create, destroy, and modify map features (wrecks, props, trees, etc).

functions.name: Spring.CreateFeature
functions.signature: Spring.CreateFeature(string defName|number featureDefID, number x, number y, number z [, number heading [, number AllyTeamID [, number featureID]]])
functions.description: Creates a feature (wreck, prop, etc) at the specified location.

functions.name: Spring.DestroyFeature
functions.signature: Spring.DestroyFeature(number featureID)
functions.description: Destroys/removes a feature from the map.

functions.name: Spring.TransferFeature
functions.signature: Spring.TransferFeature(number featureID, number teamID)
functions.description: Transfers feature ownership to a team.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureHealth
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureHealth(number featureID, number health)
functions.description: Sets feature health.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureResources
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureResources(number featureID, number metal, number energy [, number reclaimTime [, number reclaimLeft [, ...]]])
functions.description: Sets the reclaimable resource values of a feature.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureReclaim
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureReclaim(number featureID, number reclaimLeft)
functions.description: Sets remaining reclaim progress (0.0 to 1.0).

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureResurrect
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureResurrect(number featureID, number unitDefID|string unitDefName [, number facing [, number progress]])
functions.description: Configures what unit a feature resurrects into.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeaturePosition
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeaturePosition(number featureID, number x, number y, number z [, bool snapToGround])
functions.description: Sets feature position.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureAlwaysVisible
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureAlwaysVisible(number featureID, bool enable)
functions.description: Makes feature always visible on the map.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureBlocking
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureBlocking(number featureID, bool isBlocking, bool isSolidObjectCollidable, bool isProjectileCollidable, bool isRaySegmentCollidable, bool crushable, bool blockEnemyPushing, bool blockHeightChanges)
functions.description: Configures feature collision/blocking properties.

functions.name: Spring.SetFeatureMoveCtrl
functions.signature: Spring.SetFeatureMoveCtrl(number featureID [, bool enable [, ...]])
functions.description: Enables/disables Lua-controlled feature movement physics.

Give Orders.description: Functions to issue commands to units.

functions.name: Spring.GiveOrderToUnit
functions.signature: Spring.GiveOrderToUnit(number unitID, number cmdID, params = table, options = table)
functions.description: Issues a single command to a single unit. cmdID: CMD.MOVE, CMD.ATTACK, CMD.GUARD, etc.

functions.name: Spring.GiveOrderToUnitArray
functions.signature: Spring.GiveOrderToUnitArray(unitArray = table, number cmdID, params = table, options = table)
functions.description: Issues a single command to an array of units.

functions.name: Spring.GiveOrderArrayToUnitArray
functions.signature: Spring.GiveOrderArrayToUnitArray(unitArray = table, orderArray = table)
functions.description: Issues multiple commands to an array of units.

functions.name: Spring.GiveOrderToUnitMap
functions.signature: Spring.GiveOrderToUnitMap(unitMap = table, number cmdID, params = table, options = table)
functions.description: Issues a single command to units from a map table.

functions.name: Spring.GiveOrderArrayToUnitMap
functions.signature: Spring.GiveOrderArrayToUnitMap(unitMap = table, orderArray = table)
functions.description: Issues multiple commands to units from a map table.

Command Descriptions.description: Functions to modify the command list available to units.

functions.name: Spring.EditUnitCmdDesc
functions.signature: Spring.EditUnitCmdDesc(number unitID, number cmdDescID, table cmdArray)
functions.description: Modifies an existing unit command description.

functions.name: Spring.InsertUnitCmdDesc
functions.signature: Spring.InsertUnitCmdDesc(number unitID [, number cmdDescID], table cmdArray)
functions.description: Adds a new command to a unit's command list.

functions.name: Spring.RemoveUnitCmdDesc
functions.signature: Spring.RemoveUnitCmdDesc(number unitID [, number cmdDescID])
functions.description: Removes a command from a unit's command list.

Explosions & Effects.description: Functions to spawn explosions and visual effects.

functions.name: Spring.SpawnExplosion
functions.signature: Spring.SpawnExplosion(number posX, number posY, number posZ, number dirX, number dirY, number dirZ, table explosionParams)
functions.description: Creates an explosion at position with direction and parameters.

functions.name: Spring.SpawnCEG
functions.signature: Spring.SpawnCEG(string cegname, number posX, number posY, number posZ, number dirX, number dirY, number dirZ, number radius, number damage)
functions.description: Spawns a custom explosion graphics effect.

functions.name: Spring.SpawnSFX
functions.signature: Spring.SpawnSFX(number unitID, number sfxID, number posX, number posY, number posZ, number dirX, number dirY, number dirZ, number radius, number damage [, bool absolute])
functions.description: Spawns special visual effects relative to a unit.

Projectiles.description: Functions to create and control projectiles.

functions.name: Spring.SpawnProjectile
functions.signature: Spring.SpawnProjectile(number weaponDefID, table projectileParams)
functions.description: Creates a projectile with specified weapon definition and parameters.

functions.name: Spring.DeleteProjectile
functions.signature: Spring.DeleteProjectile(number projectileID)
functions.description: Removes a projectile without triggering explosion.

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectileTarget
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectileTarget(number projectileID, [number targetID, number targetType]|[number posX, number posY, number posZ])
functions.description: Sets projectile target (unit/feature ID with type, or position).

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectileMoveControl
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectileMoveControl(number projectileID, bool enable)
functions.description: Enables Lua-controlled physics for a projectile.

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectilePosition
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectilePosition(number projectileID [, number posX [, number posY [, number posZ]]])
functions.description: Sets projectile position.

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectileVelocity
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectileVelocity(number projectileID [, number velX [, number velY [, number velZ]]])
functions.description: Sets projectile velocity.

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectileCollision
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectileCollision(number projectileID)
functions.description: Triggers projectile collision (detonation).

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectileGravity
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectileGravity(number projectileID [, number grav])
functions.description: Sets projectile gravity override.

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectileAlwaysVisible
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectileAlwaysVisible(number projectileID, bool alwaysVisible)
functions.description: Makes projectile always visible.

functions.name: Spring.SetProjectileDamages
functions.signature: Spring.SetProjectileDamages(number projectileID, number weaponNum, table damages|string key, number value)
functions.description: Modifies projectile damage properties.

Terrain & Ground.description: Functions to modify terrain heightmap, metal map, grass, and terrain types.

functions.name: Spring.SetHeightMapFunc
functions.signature: Spring.SetHeightMapFunc(lua_function [, arg1 [, arg2 [, ...]]])
functions.description: Batches heightmap modifications. Inside the callback, use Spring.SetHeightMap/AddHeightMap.

functions.name: Spring.SetHeightMap
functions.signature: Spring.SetHeightMap(number x, number z, number height [, number terraform])
functions.description: Sets terrain height at (x,z). Only valid inside SetHeightMapFunc callback.

functions.name: Spring.LevelHeightMap
functions.signature: Spring.LevelHeightMap(number x1, number z1 [, number x2, number z2], number height)
functions.description: Levels terrain in a rectangular area to specified height.

functions.name: Spring.AdjustHeightMap
functions.signature: Spring.AdjustHeightMap(number x1, number z1 [, number x2, number z2], number height)
functions.description: Raises/lowers terrain in area by height amount.

functions.name: Spring.SetMetalAmount
functions.signature: Spring.SetMetalAmount(number x, number z, number metalAmount)
functions.description: Sets the metal resource density at a map location.

functions.name: Spring.SetMapSquareTerrainType
functions.signature: Spring.SetMapSquareTerrainType(number x, number z, number newType)
functions.description: Changes the terrain type of a map square (affects movement speed).

functions.name: Spring.SetSquareBuildingMask
functions.signature: Spring.SetSquareBuildingMask(number x, number z, number mask)
functions.description: Sets building restriction mask for a map square.

functions.name: Spring.AddGrass
functions.signature: Spring.AddGrass(number x, number z)
functions.description: Adds grass at the specified location.

functions.name: Spring.RemoveGrass
functions.signature: Spring.RemoveGrass(number x, number z)
functions.description: Removes grass at the specified location.

functions.name: Spring.SetNoPause
functions.signature: Spring.SetNoPause(bool noPause)
functions.description: Toggles whether the game can be paused.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitToFeature
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitToFeature(bool tofeature)
functions.description: Toggles whether units leave wreckage (features) when destroyed.

functions.name: Spring.SetExperienceGrade
functions.signature: Spring.SetExperienceGrade(number expGrade [, number ExpPowerScale [, number ExpHealthScale [, number ExpReloadScale]]])
functions.description: Configures experience level scaling thresholds.

COB Interop.description: Functions for interacting with COB (unit animation) scripts.

functions.name: Spring.CallCOBScript
functions.signature: Spring.CallCOBScript(number unitID, number funcID|string funcName, number retArgs, COBArg1, COBArg2, ...)
functions.description: Calls a COB script function on a unit.

functions.name: Spring.GetCOBScriptID
functions.signature: Spring.GetCOBScriptID(number unitID, string funcName)
functions.description: Retrieves the COB function identifier by name.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitCOBValue
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitCOBValue(number unitID [, bool splitData], number COBValue [, number param1 [, ...]])
functions.description: Reads a COB value from a unit.

functions.name: Spring.SetUnitCOBValue
functions.signature: Spring.SetUnitCOBValue(number unitID, number COBValue, number param1 [, number param2])
functions.description: Sets a COB value on a unit.
